ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java import some from dw::core::Arrays --- keysOf(payload) some ((key) -> !(['mealType', 'consumedAt'] contains (key as String)))

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Meal Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid meal Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

validation:is-false.doc:name: Can only modify mealType or consumedAt
validation:is-false.message: Can only modify mealType or consumedAt

db:select.doc:name: Select meal_id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT meal_id from meals where meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: "No data found for the provided user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

%dw 2.0 output application/java var base = "UPDATE meals " var Clause = if ( payload.mealType != null and payload.consumedAt == null ) " SET meal_type = :mealType " else if ( payload.consumedAt != null and payload.mealType == null ) " SET consumed_at = :consumedAt" else "SET meal_type = :mealType, consumed_at = :consumedAt " var endClause= " WHERE meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL" --- base ++ Clause ++ endClause

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var base = "UPDATE meals " var Clause = if ( payload.mealType != null and payload.consumedAt == null ) " SET meal_type = :mealType " else if ( payload.consumedAt != null and payload.mealType == null ) " SET consumed_at = :consumedAt" else "SET meal_type = :mealType, consumed_at = :consumedAt " var endClause= " WHERE meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL" --- base ++ Clause ++ endClause

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Meal Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid meal Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Item Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid Item Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

validation:is-false.doc:name: At least one field is required
validation:is-false.expression: #[(vars.items.foodId != null or vars.items.portionAmount != null or vars.items.portionId != null ) and (vars.items.quantityG != null)]
validation:is-false.message: At least one field is required

db:select.doc:name: Select meal_id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT meal_id from meals where meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL

db:select.doc:name: Select meal items
db:select.db:sql: SELECT item_id, portion_id, portion_amount, quantity_g FROM meal_items WHERE item_id = :itemId AND meal_id = :mealId AND deleted_at IS NULL

validation:is-false.doc:name: meals not found
validation:is-false.message: Meal not found or has been deleted

validation:is-false.doc:name: Item not found
validation:is-false.message: Item not found or has been deleted

db:select.doc:name: Retreive Food Weight
db:select.db:sql: SELECT gram_weight FROM food_portions where id = :id

set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/java
--- (vars.gram_weight.gram_weight[0] as Number) * (payload.portionAmount default vars.item_response[0].portion_amount as Number)]
set-variable.doc:name: Computed Quantity G

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var setFoodId = if (payload.foodId != null) "food_id = :foodId" else "" var setPortionId = if (payload.portionId != null) "portion_id = :portionId" else "" var setPortionAmount = if (payload.portionAmount != null) "portion_amount = :portionAmount" else "" var setQuantityG = "quantity_g = :quantityG" var setClauses = [setFoodId, setPortionId, setPortionAmount, setQuantityG] filter ($ != "") joinBy ", " --- "UPDATE meal_items SET " ++ setClauses ++ " WHERE item_id = :itemId AND meal_id = :mealId AND deleted_at IS NULL"

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { mealId: vars.mealId, itemId: vars.itemId, foodId: payload.foodId default null, portionAmount: payload.portionAmount default null, quantityG: vars.computedQuantityG, portionId: payload.portionId default null }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "UPDATE meal_items SET quantity_g = :quantityG WHERE item_id = :itemId AND meal_id = :mealId AND deleted_at IS NULL"

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { mealId: vars.mealId, itemId: vars.itemId, quantityG: payload.quantityG }

when.expression: #[payload.portionAmount == null and payload.portionId == null and payload.foodId != null]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "UPDATE meal_items SET food_id = :foodId WHERE item_id = :itemId AND meal_id = :mealId AND deleted_at IS NULL"

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { mealId: vars.mealId, itemId: vars.itemId, foodId: payload.foodId }

db:select.doc:name: Select meals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT m.meal_id, m.user_id, m.meal_type, m.consumed_at, m.logged_at as meal_logged_at, mi.item_id, mi.food_id, mi.portion_id, mi.portion_amount, mi.quantity_g, mi.logged_at as item_logged_at FROM meals m LEFT JOIN meal_items mi ON m.meal_id = mi.meal_id WHERE m.meal_id = :meal_id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (mi.deleted_at IS NULL OR mi.item_id IS NULL)

logger.doc:name: Update Complete
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal updated' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealId: vars.mealId as String } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 import transformMeal from dwl::transforms output application/json --- transformMeal(payload)
